---
name: Incorrect input detection
about: Report when Kairos incorrectly detects terminal input as a natural-language prompt (or fails to detect one it should)
title: '[Detection] '
labels: bug, ai-detection
assignees: ''
---

## What did you type?

<!-- Paste the exact terminal input that was incorrectly detected or missed -->

```
<your input here>
```

## What was detected?

<!-- e.g. "Switched to Agent Mode" / "No detection (stayed in terminal mode)" -->

## What did you expect?

<!-- e.g. "Should have stayed in terminal mode" / "Should have switched to Agent Mode" -->

## Context

- **Kairos version**: <!-- e.g. 1.2.3 — check About page in Settings -->
- **OS / platform**: <!-- e.g. Windows 11, macOS 15, Ubuntu 24.04 -->
- **Shell**: <!-- e.g. PowerShell 7, bash, zsh -->

## Additional notes

<!-- Any other relevant context: was it a multi-word command? Did it contain special characters? Was a denylist entry configured? -->
